since_last: 83% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.96%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 83% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.70% · BTC +0.74% · Gold +1.73% · Nasdaq100 +1.54%. 83% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.96%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.96%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.45%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.00%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.00%, SYNA +7.40%, LRCX +7.29%, MU +7.15%, AMAT +6.81%. Laggards: AVAV -4.68%, PLTR -3.77%, SOUN -3.09%, IBM -2.56%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.71% at $150.83
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
